home.title: Better training.
home.body: Warm, relationship-focused dog training that helps you and your dog build confidence, communication, and real-life skills together.

values.title: Trust First
values.text: Training built around connection, clarity, and confidence.

values.title: Real-Life Skills
values.text: Practical manners for homes, walks, adventures, and public life.

values.title: Warm Guidance
values.text: Supportive coaching for both dog and owner.

about.title: About Echo's Angels
paragraphs: Echo's Angels was built around the bond between dogs and their people. Training should feel clear, encouraging, and useful in real life — not overwhelming.
The goal is simple: help dogs understand what we need from them, help owners understand what their dogs are communicating, and build a relationship that feels better every day.
about.callout: Trust first. Clarity always. Better lives together.

services.title: Puppy Training
services.text: Foundations for confidence, manners, potty routines, crate comfort, social skills, and early obedience.

services.title: Basic Obedience
services.text: Sit, stay, recall, leash manners, impulse control, and daily-life reliability.

services.title: Leash Manners
services.text: Help with pulling, focus on walks, polite greetings, and calmer outdoor routines.

services.title: Confidence Building
services.text: Gentle support for nervous, shy, or easily overwhelmed dogs.

services.title: Behavior Support
services.text: Practical guidance for common behavior struggles with an owner-friendly plan.

services.title: Adventure Prep
services.text: Training for real-world outings, hiking, travel, and public manners.

testimonials.quote: Drew helped us understand our dog better and gave us a plan that actually made sense.

testimonials.quote: The training felt supportive, clear, and encouraging from the beginning.

faq.a: Echo's Angels serves Colorado Springs and the surrounding area.
Puppy training, obedience, leash manners, recall, confidence building, and behavior support. Services are easy to edit as the business grows.
Use the contact form or email echosangelsllc@gmail.com with your dog's name, age, and what you want help with.

seo.title: Echo's Angels Dog Training | Colorado Springs
seo.description: Echo's Angels provides warm, relationship-focused dog training in Colorado Springs and the surrounding area.
seo.keywords: dog training Colorado Springs, puppy training, leash manners, obedience training, Echo's Angels
